# Test fixtures

- `ct_small.dcm` — a small 128x128, 16-bit MONOCHROME2 CT slice
  (Explicit VR Little Endian). Taken from the
  [pydicom](https://github.com/pydicom/pydicom) test data set
  (`CT_small.dcm`), used here purely as an integration-test input.
- `sample.heic` — a tiny 64x64 HEIC image, only used by the `heic`-feature
  integration test. Generated from a generated test image.
